title: Figure 3 from: Dissanayake LS, Maharachchikumbura SSN, Marasinghe DS, Gao Y, Faraj TKH, Xu J, Wanasinghe DN (2026) Taxonomic novelties and phylogenetic insights into Cainiaceae (Xylariales, Sordariomycetes) associated with Poaceae hosts from Southwestern China. MycoKeys 128: 1-27. https://doi.org/10.3897/mycokeys.128.178090
author: Dissanayake, Lakmali S.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 3 Arecophila clypeata (HKAS 130466). a. Substrate; b, c. Ascomata on the host surface; d–g. Section of ascoma; h. Peridium; i. Paraphyses; j–m. Asci; m. Apical ring bluing in Melzer's reagent; n–u. Ascospores; s, t. Immature and mature ascospores stained with Indian ink (s. Immature; t. Mature); u. Germinated ascospore; v. Upper view of the one-week-old colony on PDA; w. Reverse view. Scale bars: 100 μm (f, g); 20 μm (h, n–u); 5 μm (i); 50 μm (j–m); 10 μm (k–q).
